---
title: "Week 10: Wrangling the Chaos"
subtitle: "Chapter 17"
date: "2026-10-27"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
---

## Overview

Two full sessions on data wrangling. Import, clean, and transform data using the tidyverse.

**Reading:** Chapter 17

## Key Concepts

- Data wrangling pipeline: Import, Clean, Transform
- Tidy data philosophy
- Five core dplyr verbs: filter, select, mutate, group_by + summarize, arrange
- The pipe operator
- Handling missing values, inconsistent categories, duplicates
- Working with factors
- Saving cleaned data

## Learning Objectives

1. Import data into R and clean column names
2. Use dplyr verbs to filter, transform, and summarize
3. Chain operations with the pipe
4. Handle common data problems
5. Save a cleaned dataset as RDS

## Assignment: Sampling Plan & Pilot (75 pts)

Part 1: Sampling strategy. Part 2: Pilot test on 10-20 items with reliability and revisions.
